Running security scan... Found 2 issues:
1. Missing rate-limit on /api/login
2. Sensitive fields in log output

// tests/login.test.ts
test('rate-limit', async ()=>{
for(let i=0;i<20;i++) await login();
expect(lastStatus).toBe(429);
});
